title: Help Desk (Former Student) - Steps to take before your access to Microsoft 365, Google, Box, Qualtrics, and Zoom changes
body: Why is my access changing? Your affiliation type determines how your access to affected IT services will change when you leave the University. Please see the chart below to learn more. University Affiliation Type Reason for Affiliation Type Access to OFFICE 365 Access to GOOGLE Access to BOX Access to QUALTRICS Access to ZOOM Former Student Your status indicates that you are no longer enrolled at the university Lose access Lose access Lose access Lose access Lose access When will I lose access? Timeline Microsoft View Google Workspace View Box, Qualtrics, Zoom View What should I do next? Step 1 : Classify files you created into two categories: Personal data : You can keep this data and will need to backup files before losing access to your account. University data : You will need to transfer ownership of this data to a current UW-Madison affiliate. Step 2 : Once you organize your data, your next step will be to either backup or transfer ownership of that data Note: Once your account loses access to a service, access cannot be restored. File recovery is no longer available. Backup your data before you lose access to the services below. Backup personal data Transfer ownership of University data to a current UW-Madison affiliate Microsoft 365 Leaving the University - Recommendations for Extracting Email from Microsoft 365 (Former Students) Microsoft 365 - Backup OneDrive for Business data Microsoft 365 - Preserving organizational data due to a position change or retirement Google UW-Madison Google - Backing up data UW-Madison Google - Transfer folders and files from My Drive to Shared Drives UW-Madison Google - Transfer Google data to another UW-Madison Google account Box UW-Madison Box - Backup your data Box - Transferring Folder Ownership Qualtrics Qualtrics Survey Hosting - Backup your data Qualtrics Survey Hosting - Transfer ownership of your survey Zoom Export Past Meeting Information Download Zoom Cloud Recordings Share Zoom Cloud Recordings Important Note: Once your appointment or student status changes, you will lose access to OneDrive and your license for Microsoft 365 Subscription version of Office/Outlook desktop clients will expire approximately 25 days after the change.
